name: parsimony
description: River Romney's cross-site design token system

scripts.build:meta: npm run build:cem && node scripts/build-design-system-json.mjs && node scripts/build-considerations.mjs
scripts.test:visual: npm run build && npm run build --workspace @digital2analogue2/parsimony-components && npm run build-storybook --workspace @digital2analogue2/parsimony-components && npm run test:visual --workspace @digital2analogue2/parsimony-components
scripts.test:visual:update: npm run build && npm run build --workspace @digital2analogue2/parsimony-components && npm run build-storybook --workspace @digital2analogue2/parsimony-components && npm run test:visual:update --workspace @digital2analogue2/parsimony-components
